name: smart-travel-planner
description: AI-powered Smart Travel Planner using IBM watsonx.ai (Llama 3.3 70B), Random Forest ML, ChromaDB RAG, FastAPI, and OpenWeather API

IBM_API_KEY.description: IBM Cloud API Key for watsonx.ai authentication

IBM_REGION.description: IBM Cloud region (e.g. us-south, eu-de, au-syd)

OPENWEATHER_API_KEY.description: OpenWeather API key for live weather forecasts (optional — falls back to mock data)

scripts.postdeploy: cd backend && python ml/train.py && python rag/knowledge_base.py
